channel.title: Strategy Sprints — Simon Severino
channel.description: Founder voice. Strategy Sprints. Sales acceleration, AI GTM.

item.title: Sales forces shrinking — short (2026-04-17)
item.description:
Block: 40% workforce cut. Stock +18% same day. Salesforce: 9K to 5K support roles. Meta: $2.4M revenue per employee. Up 85% in 3 years. 36% of B2B companies cut SDR teams in 2025.
The sales floor as we knew it is over.
Which of your 3 competitors rebuilds GTM first?
